purpose: Consolidate the planning brain into one canonical structure and eliminate drift in status tracking.
design_intent: Make planning artifacts predictable, searchable, and fail-safe by enforcing one root, one tracker per task, and a persisted hard copy snapshot.
change_impact: Moves or reclassifies planning artifacts, changes how progress is recorded, and adds a new snapshot cadence.
problem_statement: Planning docs live in multiple roots and progress is tracked in parallel, causing duplicates and unchecked items to diverge.
goals: Eliminate duplicate or conflicting task tracking
Persist a hard copy snapshot that captures authoritative sources and active plans
non_goals: Rewriting existing specs unless they are structurally misplaced
current_pain_points: Task status is split between plan checklists and implementation.tasks.json
Handover loop is documented in a single task template but not enforced globally

target_state.status_tracking: One tracker per task; no mirrored checklists

work_items.name: Inventory current planning artifacts
actions: Tag each item as spec, plan, task, manifest, or reference

work_items.name: Resolve out-of-root planning docs
actions: Add redirect note if a file path changes

work_items.name: Choose a single status tracker per task
actions: For each plan, keep either the sprint checklist or a task file, not both
acceptance: No duplicated task items across trackers

work_items.name: Publish the execution loop
actions: Ensure new plans link to the loop
acceptance: Execution loop is referenced in planning index

work_items.name: Persist and maintain a hard copy snapshot
actions: Update snapshot on structural changes or status changes
acceptance: Snapshot exists and is referenced from the consolidation plan

update_policy: Update when a planning file is moved or renamed
Update when a task status changes
Update when a new plan/spec is added

acceptance: Progress is tracked in one place per task
Hard copy snapshot is current and referenced
